original: A fearsome helmet of anat manufacture. It’s adorned with feathers and sculpted to resemble a grinning visage. His mouth-mounted loud hailers can turn your voice into a fanfir’s spine-breaking shout, perfect to repel a group of enemies, at the cost of a long recharge time. This particular pattern comes with built-in oxygen reserves and a tight seal to insulate the bearer from toxic atmospheres.
